originalTitle: Investors piled into ETFs at a record pace in the first half of 2026. Here’s where their money is flowing.
summary: Investors have poured money into exchange-traded funds at a rapid pace in the first half of 2026, demonstrating an unrelenting appetite for stocks associated with the AI theme.
content: Investors have poured money into exchange-traded funds at a rapid pace in the first half of 2026, demonstrating an unrelenting appetite for stocks associated with the AI theme.
chineseTitle: 2026 年上半年，投资者以创纪录的速度涌入 ETF。这就是他们的资金流向。
chineseSummary: 2026 年上半年，投资者快速向交易所交易基金注入资金，显示出对人工智能主题相关股票的浓厚兴趣。
chineseContent: 2026 年上半年，投资者快速向交易所交易基金注入资金，显示出对人工智能主题相关股票的浓厚兴趣。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
